title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Curcuma longa essential oils contains curcuminoids, a group of bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The main curcuminoids present are curcumin, demethoxycurcumin, and bisdemethoxycurcumin. These compounds work by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, such as COX-2 and 5-LOX, which are involved in the inflammation and tissue damage seen in ulcerative colitis.
